_comment: YouTube video category id -> human title, US region. Source: YouTube Data API v3 videoCategories.list (part=snippet, regionCode=US). [NEEDS VERIFICATION]: re-fetch at execution to catch any additions/renames; ids 21 and 30..44 are legacy/non-assignable in most regions but may still appear on older uploads. Consumed read-only by tools/importers/youtube_import.py to decode snippet.categoryId. Unmapped/absent ids degrade to 'Unknown (<id>)' (never fabricated).
